opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My throat feels like it's glued shut. I tried some dry crackers and now I can't swallow properly, it burns, and I feel like I'm choking.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened during dinner and I'm scared food is stuck or my throat is closing.

symptom_narrative.character: severe dry mouth, food adhering, burning throat, feeling of choking
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: can swallow water; no lip/tongue swelling; no wheeze/breathing difficulty; no fever; voice normal
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: dry eyes/mouth (sicca) with mild rheumatoid arthritis

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: secondary the dry-eyes-and-mouth (sicca) condition (dry eyes/mouth) with mild rheumatoid arthritis

objective_data_offered.value: I can sip and swallow water without choking, my voice is normal, and my lips/tongue aren't swollen; my breathing is fine
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report over video; reassuring for airway/bolus/angioedema but not a formal ENT examination
